summary: Clamp refresh_day_of_month to the actual last day of the candidate month before calling time.Date so refresh days of 29-31 don't overflow short months.
reason: Greptile P2 review of PR #635 flagged nextRefreshDate constructing time.Date(year, April, 31, ...), which time.Date normalises to May 1, pushing next_refresh one month later than reality and potentially suppressing a real WARNING projected-exhaustion status. Clamp to time.Date(year, month+1, 0).Day() before the candidate, and re-clamp for the next-month rollover branch.
validated_outcome: Apr 30 with refreshDay=31 now returns Apr 30 (was May 1); May 17 with refreshDay=31 returns May 31 (was May 31, unchanged); Feb 28 with refreshDay=31 returns Feb 28; go test ./internal/cli passes including the existing TestNextRefreshDate cases.
